name: Chocolate Mint Meltaways
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1/2 cup Mint Chocolate Chips
2 tablespoons Almonds, Toasted and Chopped
1 1/2 tablespoons Vegetable Shortening
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
COOKIES:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
1. Melt 1 cup of mint chocolate chips over hot (not boiling) water until smooth. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine butter, confectioners' sugar, and egg yolk. Beat until creamy.
3. Add melted chips and flour; beat until well blended.
4. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes. Allow to stand for 3 minutes before removing from cookie sheets.
6. Cool completely on wire racks.
GLAZE:
1. Combine the remaining 1/2 cup of mint chocolate chips and vegetable shortening over hot (not boiling) water until melted and smooth.
2. Drizzle each cooled cookie with a small amount of glaze.
3. Sprinkle with almonds.
4. Chill until set.
5. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
